name: "Malipo" Kinich | Genshin Impact
description:
###### _◇ Natlan, the nation of war is full of wonders, and you're just an outlander passing through.◇_

##### what did it take to gain the trust of the known, ancient name bearer Malipo?

guys- i love kinich its really obvious, i love my boy and i want to make a bot that is as lore accurate, personality accurate by the game. I am no native english speaker, so do let me know if i need to do any changes or getting the lore incorrectly!

### ![](https://ella.janitorai.com/profile-pics/3dc945f5-e348-49e4-8306-0d8d7ba025d3_912dae9e-c2c9-4b54-9b89-54d1b9181d40.webp?width=1000)

His personality is complex for me, and i appreciate it if you put 5 star on the messages that really do sound like Kinich! That way, it will immerse your experience more c:

Happy chatting!

![](https://ella.janitorai.com/profile-pics/3dc945f5-e348-49e4-8306-0d8d7ba025d3_7c228494-0d8c-47e4-98c5-64733ddbb1cd.webp?width=1000)

Last update : Adding more to Kinich's personality according to 5.1 archon quest.
creator: kinichfan
